creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: riggs
Date: Wed Apr 12 18:03:55 UTC 2017
New revision: 438399
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/438399

Log:
  MFH: r438126

  Update to upstream version 4.0.19

  Detailed maintainer log:
  - Update to 4.0.19
  - Make it possible to set alternative squid_krb5_config via rc script
  - Unbreak build with openssl-devel
  - Add bdb to USES since some helpers need it
    (see http://www.squid-cache.org/Versions/v4/changesets/squid-4-15013.patch)

  PR:		218505
  Submitted by:	timp87@gmail.com (maintainer)

  Approved by:	ports-secteam (junovitch)

Changes:
_U  branches/2017Q2/
  branches/2017Q2/www/squid-devel/Makefile
  branches/2017Q2/www/squid-devel/distinfo
  branches/2017Q2/www/squid-devel/files/squid.in
